# skeptic/B1: packet-only for S17-T4-B-E2
import pandas as pd
tx = pd.DataFrame({
    "fecha": pd.to_datetime(["2024-01-10", "2024-03-01"]),
    "monto": [10.0, 999.0],
})
cutoff = pd.Timestamp("2024-01-31")
pre = float(tx.loc[tx["fecha"] <= cutoff, "monto"].sum())
total = float(tx["monto"].sum())
print(total - pre)

# skeptic/B1: packet-only for S17-T4-B-E3
import pandas as pd
tx = pd.DataFrame({
    "cliente_id": ["C001", "C001"],
    "fecha": pd.to_datetime(["2024-01-10", "2024-03-01"]),
    "monto": [10.0, 999.0],
})
cutoff = pd.Timestamp("2024-01-31")
feat = tx[tx["fecha"] <= cutoff].groupby("cliente_id")["monto"].max()
print(feat.to_dict())

selfcheck.justification_from_packet: [B1/Skeptic] Skeptic: «groupby / agg / transform» — transform reinyecta el agregado al shape original (e.g. score/mean_region). agg collapses; transform does not.
